## Tags
archer, archery, game, war, weapon

## Categories
gaming, tools

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/bow-arrow)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::BowArrow;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        BowArrow { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
